main.*:
{{Plamo_Infobox|image = 1-100-Gundam-Gusion-and-Gusion-Rebake-box.jpg|Classification = 1/100 IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS|Lineup no. = 04|Scale = 1/100|Franchise = Mobile Suit Gundam IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS|Release Date = February 20, 2016|Price = ¥5,000 {{refyentax}}|JAN/ISBN = 4549660018940|Need glue? = No|Materials = PS,PE|Run = Standard|Japanese Name=1/100 ガンダムグシオン/ガンダムグシオンリベイク|Model of=ASW-G-11 Gundam Gusion, ASW-G-11 Gundam Gusion Rebake}}The [[1/100 IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS]] (NG IBO) '''ASW-G-08 Gundam Barbatos''' is a 1/100 scale kit released in 2015.

== Includes==

*Gundam Gusion/Gundam Gusion Rebake (Shared frame)
**Manipulators (1 pair for each, must share dorsal parts depending on the configuration)
***Open-palm
****Regular (Gusion Rebake)
****Gusion
***Weapon-holding
****Regular (Gusion/Gusion Rebake)
****Gusion Rebake Sub-arms
**Gusion Parts
***Gusion Hammer
***Submachine Gun
***2x2 Hand Grenades
**Gusion Rebake parts
***120mm Long-Range Rifle
***Shield
****Gusion Rebake Halberd
*****Handles
******Retracted (for storage)
******Extended
*Action Base Adapter for Gusion Rebake

==Kit Features & Gimmicks==
=== Articulation ===

==== Shared with both kits ====
*The upper arms can rotate, which includes the Gusion Rebake's sub-arm units.
*The manipulators can swivel on a ball-and-socket joint, which includes the Gusion Rebake's sub-arm units.
* The hip joint axis can swing frontward/backwards on one side.
* The upper thigh joints can swing frontwards (and backwards in some extent) on a peg-and-socket joint, raise horizontally, and/or rotate on each piece.
**Front and side skirt armors can lift up to provide clearance.
==== Gusion-specific ====
*The head can rotate/pivot on a peg-and-socket/hinge joint.
*The arms can...
**Swing on a peg-and-socket joint.
**Raise horizontally.
***The shoulder armors can lift up to provide some clearance.
*Both the elbow and knee joints can only be bent up to 90 degrees.
*The waist can only rotate 20 degrees.
*The ankle joints can pivot and/or slightly tilt in an extent.

==== Gusion Rebake-specific ====
*The head can swivel on a ball-and-socket neck joint.
*The torso can tilt forwards, or sideways (with functioning pistons).
*The arms can...
**Swivel on a ball-and-socket joint.
**Raise horizontally.
*Elbow joints can be bent up to 120 degrees.
**The sub-arm elbows are double-jointed.
*The sub-arms' wrist joints can pivot upwards due to being used for storage.
*The waist can only rotate 40 degrees.
*The knees are double-jointed.
*The ankle joints can pivot and/or slightly tilt.

=== Weapons/Other Gimmicks ===
*The Gunpla can be built into either Gusion or Gusion Rebake and vice verse.
*The hands are swappable, though they must share the same dorsal parts depending on which configuration you use.
*Any of the weapons can be wielded by their respective configurations' weapon-holding hands, which includes the Gusion Rebake's sub-arm units.
**The weapon handles/hilts and the palms feature molded tabs and tab holes for increased gripping stability.

==== Gusion-Specific ====

* Gundam Hammer can mount onto the back for storage.
* The Submachine Gun stock can be extended or retracted.
* Hand Grenades can be optionally detached from the side skirt armors, and they can be wielded by the peghole of the Gusion's open-palm hands.
* Gundam Gusion can mount onto [[Action Base]]<nowiki/>s 1 or 4 if the display stand's peghole-type adapter is used.

==== Gusion Rebake-specific ====
* The head can convert into Normal or Aiming mode via parts rearrangement, while the antennas can be folded.
* The Shield can be detached from the rear waist armor to mount onto any forearms, though the default position is on the left.
** Halberd can also mount onto the Shield, though the hilt must be swapped with the shorter one beforehand.
** The Long-Range Rifle can be separated into 4 pieces to mount into the shield for storage.
* The sub-arms from the backpack can be deployed.
* Gundam Gusion Rebake can mount onto [[Action Base]]<nowiki/>s 1 or 4 via an adapter.

==Tips and Tricks ==
* For better results, some or most of the details are needed to be applied with Gundam Markers or Mr. Color paints.
* Topcoat (Mr. Hobby recommended) can be used to protect applied stickers and if any, marking decals and painted details.

=== Customizing-based tips ===

* For greater accuracy on Gusion's frame, one must purchase another copy of the kit (or a [[1/100 IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS]] kit with the same runners) for an extra Gundam Frame, so you could paint it with the same shade of purple to properly recreate its coloration.

==Notes & Trivia==
*As it was molded in the same grey color used for the Gusion Rebake, the Gundam Frame's coloration is inaccurate when it was built into the original Gusion specification.
